version_delta_1_5_to_1_6: COMPANY OWNERSHIP EVIDENCE SEMANTICS ONLY. No seller-pressure feature, weight, formula, interaction, score-family composition, priority composition, renter-handling, contact-planning, Tier-B policy or entity/trust/estate routing-precedence change. Seller-pressure family drift 0. V1.5 stays frozen and hash-locked as the immutable comparison baseline (config/deterministic_v1.config.json). V1.6 changes only WHAT COUNTS AS ENTITY-OWNERSHIP EVIDENCE: a property_company_links row is a company ASSOCIATION, not proof the current owner of record is an entity. Traced source semantics: matching_type '21' is perfectly collinear with company_source 'property.transaction_linked_companies' (a transaction-party join) and carries no independent meaning; blank matching_type is company_source 'property.linked_company'. Historical buyer/seller/agent association can no longer independently trigger entity_authority_resolution; a historical buyer requires corroboration via the latest qualifying transfer, name match to the owner of record, transfer preceding the scoring timestamp, no later transfer, and a consistent canonical classification. Lexical evidence remains fail-closed but is labelled lexical_authority_review, not confirmed entity ownership. Implemented in scores/companyRelationship.mjs + scores/entityOwnershipEvidence.mjs; the frozen V1.5 resolver, contact planner and eligibility policy are called UNCHANGED.
version_delta_1_4_to_1_5: IDENTITY/AUTHORITY ROUTING PRECEDENCE ONLY (no seller-pressure/feature/weight/formula/interaction/composition change; motivation & execution-priority drift 0). Entity/trust/estate/probate authority now PRECEDES individual owner resolution in both ownerResolution.mjs (engine F-114) and ownerResolutionCanonical.mjs — a person name-matching a trust/estate/company name is at most an authority_unverified associated person, never an owner_confirmed individual (fixes the 2,944 owner_outreach leak). Lexical owner-name fallback (trust/estate/company terms) fail-closes to authority review even without a canonical classification. Eligibility policy: Tier B => manual_approval_required pending the provenance/independence audit; only Tier A (exact-key) stays shadow-eligible; entity/trust/estate/probate/conflict/authority_unverified never auto-outreach. Joint-party semantics split into verified_required_signers / probable_co_owners / alternate_owner_candidates / authority_unknown_parties; simultaneous_contact_allowed=false unless verified joint authority.
version_delta_1_3_to_1_4: Phase 5 IDENTITY/ROUTING ONLY: DEPRECATE blocked_not_owner as a property execution route (a property always has an owner of record). The renter+no-owner case now routes owner_resolution_required with owner_resolution_status=no_reachable_owner_contact. blocked_not_owner remains a deprecated compatibility enum value, never emitted. Canonical candidate-ranking resolution layer added (scores/ownerResolutionCanonical.mjs, outreachEligibility.mjs, resolutionPriority.mjs) — pure resolution/eligibility, no seller-pressure change. Motivation/distress/financial scores unchanged (drift 0).
version_delta: 1.2.0->1.3.0: IDENTITY GATING + EXECUTION ROUTING ONLY (no seller-pressure/financial/lien/foreclosure/distress/market/economic weight or curve changes). Adds F-114 owner_resolution (scores/ownerResolution.mjs): separates person_contact_suppressed (person-scoped renter flag) from owner_resolution_status (property) from property_execution_route. A renter flag no longer directly sets blocked_not_owner; the route follows owner resolution — new routes owner_resolution_required, manual_review_renter_owner_conflict, entity_authority_resolution; blocked_not_owner reserved for a confirmed renter with NO owner of record. Priority gate zeroes ONLY on confirmed block (or REO); unresolved/conflict/entity routes keep identity-damped priority. Motivation family scores unchanged. See 1.1->1.2 below for prior delta.
prior_version_delta_1_1_to_1_2: snapshot interface v2 unblocks F-052/F-130/F-132 from MEASURED comp data; repair_burden family scores when measured inputs exist (NOT in the motivation sum); discount_potential gains a bounded rehab_headroom term. No weight/curve/composition change.
disclaimer: Every weight below is a provisional_domain_weight: a documented domain judgment, NOT statistically calibrated. Backtesting (Phase 3 harness) must precede any calibration claim. family_params is the single numeric authority consumed by scores/families.mjs; the weights[] entries document shape, direction and exclusions for each term. No priority cap is applied: execution priority is a ranking scale, not a percentage, and saturating it (a V12 behavior) destroys ordering among the strongest candidates.

renter_block.effect: zero owner-outreach priority when NO clean owner-tier link remains (person-level gate, property-blocked only when the renter is the only linked person)
renter_block.rationale: OD-13 QA: 1,029 token/renter collisions in one batch; renters are not the seller — but a clean co-linked owner still is

link_tier_multiplier.rationale: identity confidence is multiplicative, never additive (IX-16)

scalar_corroboration_bump.rationale: OD-13 refinement: scalar-True is a vendor precision subset in live batches

weights.monotonic: stage ladder lis_pendens<nod<nos_nts<auction_scheduled; reo scores 0 (not a seller lead)
weights.shape: stage_map x recency decay (stale evidence x0.6 after 540d; past-auction-unresolved x0.35 pending review)
exclusions: lis-pendens lien docs routed to stage, never litigation pressure (IX-02)
weights.rationale: a running foreclosure clock is the strongest single distress evidence family, but stage evidence is an event, not a permanent state — it must decay

weights.monotonic: closer auction => higher, floor at 0 days
exclusions: only when F-018 in nod|nos_nts|auction_scheduled
weights.rationale: urgency sharpens nonlinearly near auction

weights.monotonic: more open severity-weighted episodes & higher amount relative to equity (fallback value) => higher
weights.shape: sum(class_weight x min(age-decayed episodes, 2)) + 25 x min(amount_to_equity|amount_to_value, 1)
exclusions: release-closed episodes contribute 0 (IX-03)
lis-pendens routed to stage when foreclosure active (IX-02)
amount preferentially relative to EQUITY (IX-01), never both ratios
weights.rationale: severity-ordered netted lien stack: government/support creditors outrank judgments outrank generic liens outrank HOA/municipal noise; a 12-year-old dormant judgment is not today's pressure

exclusions: recorded municipal/county tax lien docs sit in the municipal_hoa lien class at weight 5 — bounded residual overlap, documented
weights.rationale: sustained non-payment on owned real estate is high-signal disengagement

exclusions: vacancy counts here once; it corroborates landlord-fatigue composite only via occupancy routing, and F-137 is descriptive-only
weights.rationale: a vacant house is pure carrying cost with no use value — direct disengagement evidence

weights.monotonic: less equity => more pressure; equity preferred, LTV only as fallback
exclusions: equity and LTV are arithmetic complements — NEVER combined in one term (IX-01)
weights.rationale: an underwater or pinned owner is financially stressed; the DEAL consequences of thin equity live in dealability/discount, not here — pressure and executability are different axes

weights.monotonic: NOT monotone: <=2y elevates ONLY with distress context (failed-buy pattern needs the failure); >=12y elevates; 4-8y trough
exclusions: suppressed by F-005 unless distress families >= 40 points
weights.rationale: long-hold aging-out (A3) + failed-recent-buy (A5); a happy recent buyer is the least likely seller

exclusions: life-event docs feed propensity POINTS here; estate STAGE (complexity/authority axes) consumes the same docs for non-motivation purposes — different axes, not a double count (IX-14 router)
weights.rationale: death/probate/divorce is the strongest documented life-disruption evidence in the corpus

exclusions: expired/withdrawn only; an ACTIVE listing is an agent-flow routing gate, never a propensity input (IX-10, T-10)
weights.rationale: a failed retail attempt is proven intent to sell plus a demonstrated retail-path failure

exclusions: episode must be closed — open episodes score in F-013 only
weights.rationale: satisfying old liens is classic pre-sale behavior (archetype A6)
adjustable/balloon structures add payment-shock risk
senior equity release; estate-sale trajectory
a recorded mortgage modification is documented prior distress

weights.monotonic: >=2 vendor strain indicators with link tier >= medium
weights.shape: x1.15 on existing property-side pressure, never standalone
exclusions: IX-18: vendor tiers corroborate only until holdout-validated; zero effect when property-side pressure is 0
weights.rationale: personal strain converts property pressure into urgency (IX-06) but cannot manufacture pressure

exclusions: condition feeds distress once; excluded from tired-landlord composite; repair-cost economics live in blocked F-053/F-132 (IX-04)
weights.rationale: visible neglect proxies owner disengagement

exclusions: cohort-degraded: national bands until snapshots
weights.rationale: cap-ex burden proxy, deliberately small absent local norms

weights.shape: min(20, composite x 4); ASR lives INSIDE the composite
exclusions: flag never alone; condition excluded (scores in distress); ASR not double-added
weights.rationale: fatigue requires rental context: absentee + tenant/multi-unit + rent-assignment leverage

weights.monotonic: scale small flat; dispositions dominate; leverage amplifies for multi-owners
exclusions: F-105 magnitude guard voids all portfolio terms
portfolio leverage separate from per-property LTV (IX-12)
weights.rationale: liquidation MOTION is evidence; scale alone is weak; concentrated portfolio debt makes each property a candidate cash source

exclusions: non-valuation-class basis excluded (T-06/IX-15)
weights.rationale: embedded gain enables below-retail acceptance (archetype A4)

weights.monotonic: equity headroom + low-basis acquisition + seasoned cash basis + payable pressure; halved when condition is Excellent/VG and appreciation < 1.3x
exclusions: equity headroom counts here for PAYABILITY; its pressure aspect lives in financial_pressure; F-050 reuse is the IX-01 interaction (payoff-negotiation lever), capped at 4
weights.rationale: discount capacity = can the owner afford to say yes (equity/basis) x will they psychologically accept below-retail (anchors, pressure)

weights.monotonic: more compliant wireless => higher execution readiness
exclusions: hard compliance blocks already removed channels before counting
IX-19: zero channels + extreme distress + equity routes to alternate-channel escalation instead of sinking priority
weights.rationale: execution priority needs a reachable channel; motivation score unaffected
OD-12: conflicts surface as quality signals, never silently averaged

weights.monotonic: higher repair-to-value => higher capex load; repairs exceeding the measured spread add a value-trap marker
exclusions: NOT in the motivation sum — condition scores disengagement once in property_distress (IX-04)
vendor baseline is rule-9 comparison data, never canonical
weights.rationale: quantifies capex load from measured comp data; descriptor + discount/dealability input

weights.monotonic: measured renovated spread covering repairs => as-is discount rationale
weights.shape: cover<=0.67 => +6; <=1.0 (or repairs unmeasured) => +3; repairs exceed spread => 0
exclusions: only when snapshot v2 measured the spread from >=2 good + >=2 poor condition comps (IX-04)
weights.rationale: poor condition creates discount headroom only where renovated comps prove the spread exists

ix19_escalation.note: P2-7: disabled from production outreach; produces recommended caps from backtest simulation only
